title: Announcement on English Preparatory School Placement Exam
content:
Announcements

Details

Announcement on English Preparatory School Placement Exam

Another face-to-face Placement Exam

is to be held on September 28, 29 and 30 on Dudullu Campus for our students who have recently completed their registration at English Preparatory program through YKS/YÖS/DGS/Additional Placement/Voluntary Placement.

Exam Dates on Dudullu Campus

Exam Hours at B1-02                           Lab on Dudullu Campus

Exam Hours at B1-04 Lab on Dudullu Campus

September 28-

10:00 / 11:00 / 12:00 / 14:00/ 15:00 / 16:00

09:30 / 10:30 / 11:30 / 12:30 / 14:30 15:30

September 29-

10:00 / 11:00 / 12:00 / 14:00 / 15:00 / 16:00

09:30 / 10:30 / 11:30 / 12:30 / 14:30 15:30

September 30–

10:00 / 11:00 / 12:00 / 14:00 / 15:00 / 16:00

09:30 / 10:30 / 11:30 / 12:30 / 14:30 15:30

It is compulsory

to take the placement for

our students who have registered in undergraduate programs where medium of instruction is English and those who desire to take Voluntary English Preparatory Education.

The students will be informed about their levels right after the exam, and those whose level is B1 and above will be eligible to take

DUIYES on 04 October 2022

.

The details on Doğuş University English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will

soon

be shared with our students as an announcement

on our website

.
